_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill to develop a collection plan that clearly shows the discipline that can be used to collect the information needed.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and running data stewardship programs, including steward selection, training, responsibility definition, and performance measurement.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-007 (LS, cosine: 0.491), DG-S-009 (DG, cosine: 0.485).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.542). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [clearly, collect, collection, develop, discipline, information] vs WIDAI-only terms [data, definition, designing, measurement, performance, programs] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.874, R=0.866). Balanced P/R — the 20-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill to develop a collection plan that clearly shows the discipline that can be" and "Skill in designing and running data stewardship programs, including steward sele" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.525 ≈ STS 0.542 (gap 0.017). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.1%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [clearly, collect, collection, develop, discipline, information]. WIDAI-only: [data, definition, designing, measurement, performance, programs].
